title: Scientists ejected from diabetes conference for distributing journal reprints
summary: Scientists including the editor-in-chief and former president of the American Diabetes Association were ejected from a diabetes conference for distributing journal reprints. The incident highlights tensions between open access to scientific research and publisher restrictions over document distribution.
content: Those ousted included ADA journal editor-in-chief Steven Kahn and former ADA president Desmond Schatz

zh.title: 科学家因传播期刊重印文件被逐出糖尿病会议
zh.summary: 包括美国糖尿病协会主编和前主席的科学家因在糖尿病会议上传播期刊重印文件而被驱逐。这一事件突显了开放获取科学研究与出版商对文件传播限制之间的紧张关系。

title: OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks
summary: OpenAI introduced Lockdown Mode, a security feature designed to reduce the risk of sensitive data exposure through prompt injection attacks on ChatGPT. While the feature doesn't eliminate all vulnerabilities, it represents a step toward protecting users handling confidential information.
content: Even with Lockdown Mode, ChatGPT could be still vulnerable to prompt injections, but the goal is to reduce the likelihood that sensitive data gets shared in the process.

zh.title: OpenAI推出锁定模式以防止提示注入攻击泄露敏感信息
zh.summary: OpenAI推出了锁定模式，这是一项安全功能，旨在降低通过ChatGPT的提示注入攻击导致敏感数据泄露的风险。虽然该功能无法消除所有漏洞，但它是保护处理机密信息用户的一步进展。

title: What to expect from WWDC 2026: Siri’s highly anticipated revamp and Apple Intelligence updates
summary: Apple's WWDC 2026 will feature a major overhaul of Siri and new Apple Intelligence updates, marking the company's push to integrate AI more deeply into its ecosystem. The event is closely watched as a signal of Apple's AI strategy and commitment to voice assistant improvements.
content: Apple's WWDC nears: Here's what you can look forward to.

zh.title: 期待 WWDC 2026：Siri 的大幅改版和 Apple Intelligence 更新
zh.summary: Apple 的 WWDC 2026 将推出 Siri 的重大改版和新的 Apple Intelligence 更新，标志着该公司深化人工智能在其生态系统中的集成。该活动被广泛关注，被视为 Apple 人工智能战略和对语音助手改进承诺的体现。

title: The first Story-Rich showcase was packed with narrative-driven games
summary: Fellow Traveller's inaugural Story-Rich Showcase featured over 20 narrative-driven indie games, with Ambrosia Sky announcing a free second episode coming August 6th. The event highlights the indie gaming community's emphasis on storytelling and world-building over technical spectacle.
content:
Fellow Traveller, the publisher behind games like Titanium Court and 1000xResist, just wrapped up its Story-Rich Showcase, which featured a bunch of narrative-driven indie games. With more than 20 games on display, there was a lot to follow, but we've pulled together some of the most notable announcements below. You can also catch the full show on Fellow Traveller's YouTube channel.
Ambrosia Sky is getting its second and final episode

Ambrosia Sky, a sci-fi game about death where you have to clean up alien fungi, will be getting its second act as a free update on August 6th. The game was originally planned to have three acts, but developer …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 首届 Story-Rich 展示汇聚众多叙事驱动型游戏
zh.summary: Fellow Traveller 的首届 Story-Rich 展示汇聚了超过 20 款叙事驱动型独立游戏，其中 Ambrosia Sky 宣布免费第二集将于 8 月 6 日发布。该活动突出了独立游戏社区对叙事和世界构建的重视，超越了技术奇观。

title: GOG apologizes for emailing people Nazi symbols
summary: GOG's newsletter promoting "The End of the Sun" inadvertently included Slavic runes that resembled Nazi SS symbols, which the company attributed to miscommunication with its German QA team and technical rendering issues. The incident underscores the importance of cultural sensitivity review in digital communications.
content:
Good ol' games? | Image: GOG	

GOG sent a newsletter about the game The End of the Sun on June 5th that included symbols associated with the Nazi SS. The Steam competitor issued a statement attributing the inclusion to a "series of mistakes," including miscommunication with the German QA team, inconsistent font rendering, and being understaffed during a bank holiday, among other things.
The game is a fantasy title set in a universe based on Slavic mythology and culture. So GOG included Slavic runes in its email promoting the title, including the Sowilō symbol, which means "sun". According to one of GOG's multiple explanations, some platforms, including mobile phones, ren …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: GOG 为邮件中包含纳粹符号而道歉
zh.summary: GOG 推广"The End of the Sun"的新闻通讯意外包含了类似纳粹党卫军符号的斯拉夫符文，该公司将其归咎于与德国质量保证团队的沟通不畅和技术渲染问题。该事件强调了文化敏感性审查在数字通讯中的重要性。

title: Sriram Krishnan is leaving his role as White House AI advisor
summary: Sriram Krishnan is leaving his position as White House AI advisor and reportedly launching a new institution to continue shaping Trump administration AI policy. His departure signals potential shifts in how the administration structures its AI advisory framework.
content: Krishnan is reportedly starting a new institution to continue shaping Trump's AI policy.

zh.title: 斯里拉姆·克里什南离开白宫AI顾问职位
zh.summary: 斯里拉姆·克里什南正在离开他的白宫人工智能顾问职位，并据报道正在启动一个新机构以继续塑造特朗普政府的人工智能政策。他的离职预示着政府可能会改变其人工智能顾问框架的结构方式。

title: The cutest games from the Wholesome Direct 2026 showcase
summary: The Wholesome Direct 2026 showcased over 50 indie games emphasizing wholesome, community-focused gameplay, with Hidden Folks 2 among the notable reveals. The event provides a chill alternative to blockbuster gaming showcases by highlighting creative indie titles.
content:
Every year at Summer Game Fest, nestled in between the splashy blockbuster showcases, the Wholesome Direct provides a nice change of pace. It's similarly packed with games - this year's edition had more than 50 - but the vibe is more chill and, well, wholesome. As in years past, I've pulled out some of the more intriguing reveals and announcements, though you can watch the whole thing for yourself right here. And if you're interested in checking out some of the games - a few are available now, and a bunch have demos - there's a dedicated Steam page.

Hidden Folks 2
Way back in 2017, Hidden Folks helped usher in a new genre of seek-and-find  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Wholesome Direct 2026展会上最可爱的游戏
zh.summary: Wholesome Direct 2026展示了50多款独立游戏，强调了温馨、以社区为中心的游戏玩法，其中《Hidden Folks 2》是值得注意的揭露之一。该活动通过突出创意独立游戏作品，为大片游戏展会提供了一个轻松的替代方案。

title: The Trump administration might take an equity stake in OpenAI
summary: The Trump administration is exploring deals to take an equity stake in OpenAI, framed as enabling Americans to benefit from AI company success. This reflects the administration's interest in capturing economic returns from the domestic AI sector.
content: President Donald Trump said he's discussing deals "where the American people can benefit from the success of AI."

zh.title: 特朗普政府可能在OpenAI中获得股权
zh.summary: 特朗普政府正在探索交易以在OpenAI中获得股权，框架是让美国人能够从人工智能公司的成功中受益。这反映了政府对从国内人工智能部门获取经济回报的兴趣。

title: Summer Game Fest 2026: All the news from gaming’s busiest week
summary: Summer Game Fest 2026 unveiled major announcements including PlayStation's new single-player focus with Wolverine and God of War, Final Fantasy VII Revelation, Resident Evil: Code Veronica remake, and GTA VI's November release. Rising console and hardware prices have become a central industry concern amid the event announcements.
content:
Get ready for some gaming news. It’s officially June, which means splashy new events from PlayStation, Xbox, and gaming hype man Geoff Keighley, as well as a bunch of smaller events with hidden gems.
PlayStation kicked things off with a big event that featured a new look at Wolverine ahead of its September launch, a September release date announcement for Control Resonant, and an extended reveal of a brand new God of War title. The show was mostly about premium single-player games — a statement from PlayStation that it’s getting back to what it’s good at. 
At Summer Game Fest Live on Friday, the biggest news was Final Fantasy VII Revelation, the third and final game in the FFVII Remake trilogy. But we also got announcements of a Resident Evil: Code Veronica remake, a January 15th release date — and a Tupac casting announcement — for RGG Studio’s Stranger Than Heaven, and new Cuphead titles from Studio MDHR.
Xbox’s big show is still to come on Sunday at 1PM ET. But so far, one of the biggest storylines of the show has been everyone avoiding Grand Theft Auto VI’s November 19th release date, which is warping the release calendar. And this year’s events are taking place at a difficult time for the industry. The prices of consoles and gaming hardware have skyrocketed, with all of the three major console players announcing price hikes and PC handheld makers jacking up hardware costs as well.
We’ll be tracking the biggest news of the June gaming events season right here.
A deep dive on the new Virtua Fighter.
			
The first Story-Rich showcase was packed with narrative-driven games
			
Don’t worry: Queen’s Blood is back for Final Fantasy VII Revelation.
			
Fellow Traveller’s Story-Rich Showcase is starting now.
			
The cutest games from the Wholesome Direct 2026 showcase
			
Yooka-Laylee is back as a karting game.
			
Wait, Tupac was in a Summer Game Fest Live trailer? In 2026?
			
The original Hitman trilogy is getting remastered.
			
Monster Hunter Wilds is coming to the

zh.title: 2026年夏季游戏节：游戏界最繁忙一周的所有新闻
zh.summary: 2026年夏季游戏节公布了重大公告，包括PlayStation新的单人游戏焦点《金刚狼》和《战神》、《最终幻想VII启示》、《生化危机：维罗妮卡密码》重制版和《GTA VI》11月发布。不断上升的主机和硬件价格已成为活动公告中业界关注的中心问题。

title: 4K Blu-rays are three for $33 ahead of Father’s Day
summary: Gruv is offering three 4K Blu-rays for $33 ahead of Father's Day on June 21st, featuring both classic and modern films with individual savings up to $9 per title. The promotion requires no code and includes popular titles like North by Northwest and Birds of Prey.
content:
Director Damien Chazelle went from La La Land directly into First Man, the latter of which is included in this sale. | Photo by Daniel McFadden / Universal Studios	

If you know a dad with a predilection for physical media, he might really dig what you buy for him with this deal at Gruv. Ahead of Father’s Day on June 21st, the online seller (operated by Universal Pictures, in case you didn’t know) is letting you check out with three movies from a large batch for $33 — no code required. Of course, you don’t need to be a dad, or be buying for one, to get in on these deals. To my knowledge, there is no dad verification system at work here.
There aren’t many new releases looped into the sale. Rather, it’s focused on classics — modern as well as those from decades prior — that might round out dad’s collection without breaking the bank. Prices for movies at Gruv range from $13.99 or so to $20, so the total savings vary depending on what you buy. In the event that you only buy one 4K Blu-ray today and it’s your first purchase at Gruv, use the code FIRSTGRUV15 at checkout to save 15 percent off the cost.
Here’s a handful of picks from the group that are eligible for the discount.
North by Northwest

Where to Buy:

 $17.99 $11 at Gruv (4K Blu-ray)

Birds of Prey: And the Fantabulous Emancipation of One Harley Quinn

Where to Buy:

 $15.15 $11 at Gruv (4K Blu-ray)

Ambulance

Where to Buy:

 $20.9 $11 at Gruv (4K Blu-ray)

Batman: Mask of the Phantasm

Where to Buy:

 $17.03 $11 at Gruv

zh.title: 父亲节前3张4K蓝光光盘仅售33美元
zh.summary: Gruv在6月21日父亲节前推出三张4K蓝光光盘33美元的促销优惠，包含经典和现代电影，每张单独最多可节省9美元。此促销无需代码，包括《西北偶遇》和《猛禽小姐姐》等热门电影。

title: The mayor of Shelbyville, Indiana, says only people who live in ‘shitty houses’ oppose data center
summary: Shelbyville, Indiana's mayor Scott Furgeson faced criticism after being recorded dismissing opponents of a $2 billion data center as residents of poor-quality properties. The incident highlights tensions between municipal development initiatives and working-class community opposition.
content:
A proposed $2 billion data center has become a political flashpoint in the small city of Shelbyville, Indiana. And the controversy has only grown more intense after the mayor, Scott Furgeson, was caught on camera saying of the "No Data Center" signs going up that, "I've seen a lot of these all over town, but I only see them in shitty houses," before adding, "most of them are rentals."
The woman speaking to him in the clip quickly pushes back, saying that they're "working class," and someone chimes in to add something that a mayor shouldn't have to be told about their constituents: "it doesn't matter whether they're rentals, they're still hu …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 印第安纳州谢尔比维尔市长称反对数据中心的人住在"破房子"里
zh.summary: 印第安纳州谢尔比维尔市长斯科特·弗格森因被录音显示他将20亿美元数据中心的反对者贬低为住在低质量房屋的居民而遭到批评。该事件凸显了市政发展倡议与工薪阶层社区反对之间的矛盾。

title: Beyond Instagram: Introducing the next generation of social apps
summary: New social media platforms are emerging as alternatives to Big Tech's algorithmic feeds, prioritizing user interests, creativity, and community engagement over engagement-maximizing algorithms. These apps represent a growing push toward more transparent and user-controlled social networking.
content: These newer social apps offer alternatives to Big Tech’s feeds, focusing on interests, creativity, and community.

zh.title: 超越Instagram：介绍下一代社交应用
zh.summary: 新的社交媒体平台正在出现，作为大科技公司算法提要的替代品，优先考虑用户利益、创意和社区参与，而不是追求最大化参与度的算法。这些应用代表了朝着更透明和用户可控的社交网络的不断推进。

title: Benn Jordan longs for the days of tech that didn’t spy on you
summary: Benn Jordan, originally known for music reviews and gear coverage, has shifted his YouTube channel focus toward technology and surveillance investigations, including AI-generated music and data privacy concerns. His evolution reflects broadening public concern about surveillance capitalism and tech industry accountability.
content:
Benn refuses to be pigeon holed. | Image: Benn Jordan	

Benn Jordan may have initially gained notoriety for his music as Flashbulb and later, reviewing synths and effects pedals on YouTube under Benn and Gear. But about five years ago, Benn decided to take his YouTube channel in a different direction. He didn't stop covering music gear overnight, but as time progressed, his channel became more focused on science and technology investigations. He even turned the entire enterprise into a nonprofit.
While there will still be the occasional video focused on music or audio - say, poisoning AI music systems or storing data in bird song - lately Benn has been largely focused on the surveillance state.  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Benn Jordan渴望科技不监视你的时代
zh.summary: Benn Jordan原本以音乐评论和器材评测而闻名，他将YouTube频道的重点转向技术和监视调查，包括AI生成音乐和数据隐私问题。他的转变反映了公众对监视资本主义和科技行业问责的日益增长的关注。

title: 82-0 is the best basketball game, to hell with NBA 2K
summary: 82-0 is a fantasy basketball game that combines statistical depth with instant gratification by having players draft historical teams across random eras to achieve a perfect 82-win season. The game offers a more accessible and engaging alternative to traditional sports simulations.
content:
Can you go undefeated? | Screenshot: The Verge	

82-0 marries the stat nerd fun of fantasy basketball with instant gratification and a bit of dumb luck. The goal is to draft a team of players that could (theoretically) have a perfect 82-0 season. 
Obviously, if you just had free rein to pick whoever you wanted from throughout history, there would be little challenge. The twist is that the site randomly selects a team and an era, and then you pick a single player. So, for example, if you pulled the Knicks and 2020s, you might pick Jalen Brunson as your point guard, then you'd get a new team and era to select your center from. 
You can reshuffle the team once, and the era once, if you don' …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 82-0是最好的篮球游戏，别管NBA 2K
zh.summary: 82-0是一款幻想篮球游戏，通过让玩家在随机时代中征选历史球队来实现完美的82胜赛季，将统计深度与即时满足感相结合。该游戏提供了一种比传统体育模拟游戏更易获得且更有吸引力的替代品。

title: Meta made its own AI-generated clickbait news feed
summary: Meta's AI app now includes a "For You" section with AI-generated clickbait news stories, images, and content of questionable accuracy. The feature represents Meta's expansion into AI-generated content feeds, raising concerns about misinformation and low-quality synthetic content.
content:
An AI-generated image of the royal family featuring two Queen Elizabeth IIs. | ﻿Image: Meta AI	

Facebook has long been filled with feeds of clickbait articles. Now, Meta is making its own clickbait articles with AI.
The standalone Meta AI app now has a "For You" section that populates a list of clickbait-style stories for you to read. But the topics, images, and text are all AI-generated - and as questionable as you'd expect from AI-created works.
The Meta AI app first launched in April 2025 with its focus on a public "Discover" feed that showed AI-generated images and conversations from other users (who frequently seemed unaware that they were being made public). That's all disappeared. The app now has a standard chatbot interface,  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Meta 推出了自己的 AI 生成的标题党新闻源
zh.summary: Meta 的 AI 应用现在包含一个"为你推荐"部分，提供 AI 生成的标题党新闻故事、图片和准确度可疑的内容。该功能代表了 Meta 在 AI 生成内容源方面的扩展，引发了对虚假信息和低质量合成内容的担忧。

title: Kabuto Park captures the fleeting joy of summer vacation
summary: Kabuto Park is an indie game now on Xbox and Switch that captures the nostalgic feeling of a childhood summer while delivering a Pokémon-style adventure within a few hours of gameplay. The game's appeal lies in its ability to evoke summer memories while maintaining engaging mechanics.
content:
There are a lot of games that remind me of summer - hot days in the backseat with a copy of Dragon Warrior III, cooling off in the basement while grinding Gran Turismo races - but there aren't a lot of games that are actually about summer. That's part of what makes Kabuto Park so charming. It's a game that manages to not only capture the fleeting moments of a childhood summer, but also cram a Pokémon-style adventure into a game that lasts only a few hours.
Kabuto Park actually launched last year on PC, but it's available now on both Xbox and the Switch, the latter being probably the ideal platform for it. It takes place over the course of a …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Kabuto Park 捕捉夏季假期转瞬即逝的欢乐
zh.summary: Kabuto Park 是一款现已登陆 Xbox 和 Switch 的独立游戏，它捕捉了儿童夏季的怀旧感受，同时提供了几小时游玩时间的宝可梦式冒险。这款游戏的吸引力在于它能唤起夏季回忆，同时保持引人入胜的机制。

title: Here comes new Siri again
summary: Apple is unveiling an updated Siri at WWDC with new AI capabilities and ChatGPT integration. The redesign marks another attempt to deliver on Apple Intelligence promises made in 2024, as the company works to establish credibility in the competitive AI market after delays.
content:
Our first glimpse of the new AI Siri came all the way back at WWDC 2024.	

Apple has been on its back foot, AI-wise, for the past few years. But in a strange way, playing from behind might not be such a bad move.
At WWDC on Monday, Apple appears to be getting ready to reintroduce us to the new Siri. Again. As a reminder, we met the new Siri in 2024 when Apple "launched" Apple Intelligence. Siri came with a new glowing border, different voice options, and the ability to punt questions to ChatGPT. The whole "Intelligence" bit of the Siri redesign was coming soon, Apple promised. It didn't. In fact, its promotion around Apple Intelligence was so misleading that the company is settling a class-action lawsuit and has t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 新的Siri即将推出
zh.summary: 苹果公司在WWDC大会上推出了升级版的Siri，具备新的AI功能和ChatGPT集成。这次重新设计是苹果公司另一次尝试实现其在2024年做出的Apple Intelligence承诺，该公司正在努力在延期后的竞争激烈的AI市场中建立可信度。

title: The next YouTube phenomenon hitting the big screen
summary: A viral YouTube phenomenon is crossing over to mainstream cinema and television. The story explores how internet culture trends are gaining wider entertainment attention and reshaping media production patterns.
content:
Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 131, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, happy last week of productivity before the World Cup starts, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) 
This week, I've been reading about the World Cup and peptides and parasocial media, catching up on Clarkson's Farm ahead of the new season, buying literally every single new item in The Verge Shop, watching so so so many BTS concert clips on my social feeds, brainstorming ways to resurrect my old Facebook Portal, testing Spokenly to see if it's the dictation app for me, and ponying …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 下一个YouTube现象登上大荧幕
zh.summary: 一个病毒式的YouTube现象正在跨越到主流电影和电视领域。这个故事探讨了互联网文化趋势如何获得更广泛的娱乐关注，以及如何重塑媒体制作模式。

title: Some ancient microbes frozen with Ötzi the Iceman are still growing
summary: Microbes preserved alongside Ötzi the Iceman for 5,300 years remain alive and metabolically active, researchers have found. The discovery challenges conventional understanding of ancient biological preservation and raises fundamental questions about the definition of organisms and ecosystems.
content: What’s the difference between a person, an artifact, and an ecosystem?

zh.title: 与冰人奥茨一起冷冻的某些古代微生物仍在生长
zh.summary: 研究人员发现，与冰人奥茨一起保存了5,300年的微生物仍然活着并且具有代谢活性。这一发现挑战了人们对古代生物保存的传统理解，并对生物体和生态系统的定义提出了根本性问题。
